name: Red Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry bacon in a skillet and set aside.
2. Cook onion in the drippings over medium-high heat until tender.
3. Combine bacon, onion, tomatoes, rice, ham, and seasonings in a Crock-Pot.
4. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 8 hours or on High for 3 to 4 hours.
5. Serve.
Serves 6 to 8
Note: If hotter rice is desired, add more hot sauce to taste.
